Summary: [FE] User Registration Flow
Description:
As a user, I want to create an account so that I can save events and itineraries.

This ticket covers the complete user registration flow including form input, validation, backend integration, error handling, and post-registration navigation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can enter required registration details (name, email, password, confirm password)
- Validation errors are shown for invalid input
- Backend validation errors are displayed to the user (e.g., duplicate email)
- Loading state is shown during form submission
- Account is successfully created and auth tokens are stored securely
- User is redirected appropriately after successful registration

[BE] User Registration API
Description:
As a backend service, I need to provide a secure user registration endpoint so that the frontend can create new user accounts.

This ticket covers the backend implementation of the signUp GraphQL mutation including user creation, password hashing, token generation, and profile initialization.
Acceptance Criteria:
- signUp mutation accepts email, password, firstName, lastName
- Password is hashed before storage
- Duplicate email returns USER_EXISTS error
- User profile is auto-created on registration
- Access and refresh tokens are generated
- Session is created and tracked
- Response includes authPayload with user data

Summary: [BE] User Login/Logout API
Description:
As a backend service, I need to provide secure login and logout endpoints so that users can authenticate and manage their sessions.

This ticket covers the backend implementation of the signIn and signOut GraphQL mutations including credential validation, session management, and token handling.
Acceptance Criteria:
- signIn mutation validates email and password
- Invalid credentials return INVALID_CREDENTIALS error
- Deactivated accounts return ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED error
- Access and refresh tokens are generated
- Session is created with device info
- Existing valid refresh tokens are reused
- signOut clears session/tokens

Summary: [FE] Onboarding Flow
Description:
As a new user, I want to select my interests during onboarding so recommendations are personalized from the start.

This ticket covers the frontend implementation of a first-time user onboarding flow.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Onboarding shown on first login
- Onboarding not shown on subsequent logins
- User can select multiple interests
- User can skip onboarding
- Location permission requested during onboarding
- Interests saved to profile
- Completion redirects to main app
- Skip redirects to main app with defaults
